message:
feat: add config UI scrolling and OrbStack container runtime support

## Config UI Scrolling
- Add viewport scrolling with scroll indicators for small terminal windows
- Implement auto-scroll to keep focused elements visible
- Add manual scroll controls (PgUp/PgDown, Ctrl+U/Ctrl+D)
- Fix button placement to be accessible in scrollable content
- Add proper spacing around Save/Cancel buttons
- Fix navigation bounds to stop at top/bottom instead of looping
- Ensure header visibility when at top of configuration

## OrbStack Support
- Add OrbStack as container runtime option alongside docker/podman
- Implement OrbStack detection via CLI and Docker context checking
- Add automatic Docker context switching when OrbStack selected
- Update tests to include OrbStack as valid runtime
- Maintain full Docker CLI compatibility

Both features improve accessibility and provide more container runtime options
while maintaining backward compatibility with existing functionality.
